account.title: Account
account.languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the interface

quickSettings.title: Quick Settings
quickSettings.sendByCtrlEnterDescription: When enabled, pressing Ctrl+Enter will send the message instead of just Enter. This is useful for IME users to avoid accidental sends.

dragHandle.toggleAndMove: Click to toggle, drag to move

settingsHome.configRequiredDescription: Configure model services before running this service.

config.detail: Model pool, agents, routing, memory, search, and service settings

mcp.detail: Configure MCP tools from global or project JSON

appearanceMode.title: Theme Mode
appearanceMode.detail: Follow the system appearance, or pin a light / dark theme.

chatInput.title: Chat & Input
chatInput.detail: Tool display, scroll behavior, and send shortcut

codeEditor.detail: Word wrap, line numbers, minimap, and font size

permissions.detail: Manage allowed and blocked tool rules

telemetry.title: Telemetry
telemetry.detail: Send anonymous usage data to help improve the product

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Control which notification events you receive.

webPush.title: Web Push Notifications
webPush.unsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
webPush.denied: Push notifications are blocked. Please allow them in your browser settings.

darkMode.label: Dark Mode
darkMode.description: Toggle between light and dark themes

projectSorting.label: Project Sorting
projectSorting.description: How projects are ordered in the sidebar

theme.label: Editor Theme
theme.description: Default theme for the code editor

wordWrap.label: Word Wrap
wordWrap.description: Enable word wrapping by default in the editor

showMinimap.label: Show Minimap
showMinimap.description: Display a minimap for easier navigation in diff view

lineNumbers.label: Show Line Numbers
lineNumbers.description: Display line numbers in the editor

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Applies to the code editor only (px). Chat and sidebar keep the system default.

scope.label: Scope
scope.userDescription: User scope: Available across all projects on your machine
scope.projectDescription: Local scope: Only available in the selected project
scope.cannotChange: Scope cannot be changed when editing an existing server

validation.stdioRequiresCommand: stdio type requires a command field
validation.jsonHelp: Paste your MCP server configuration in JSON format. Example formats:

git.title: Git Configuration
git.description: Configure your git identity for commits. These settings will be applied globally via git config --global

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Generate API keys to access the external API from other applications.

newKey.alertMessage: This is the only time you'll see this key. Store it securely.

apiKeys.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this API key?

github.title: GitHub Tokens
github.description: Add GitHub Personal Access Tokens to clone private repositories via the external API.
github.descriptionAlt: Add GitHub Personal Access Tokens to clone private repositories. You can also pass tokens directly in API requests without storing them.

form.howToCreate: How to create a GitHub Personal Access Token →

github.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this GitHub token?

documentation.title: External API Documentation
documentation.description: Learn how to use the external API to trigger PilotDeck sessions from your applications.

notInstalled.title: TaskMaster AI CLI Not Installed
notInstalled.description: TaskMaster CLI is required to use task management features. Install it to get started:

steps.autoAvailable: TaskMaster features will automatically become available
steps.initCommand: Use task-master init in your project directory

settings.enableDescription: Show TaskMaster tasks, banners, and sidebar indicators across the interface

login.title: Login
login.description: Sign in to your {{agent}} account to enable AI features
login.reAuthDescription: Sign in with a different account or refresh credentials

permissions.title: Permission Settings
permissions.description: Manage which tools the assistant can run without asking. Grants from the chat "Add permission" button land here too.
permissions.importExportHint: Share or back up your tool permissions as JSON.
permissions.importReadError: Could not read the selected file.
permissions.importInvalid: Not a valid permissions export. Expected JSON with allowedTools / disallowedTools.
permissions.importConfirmBody: Merge {{allowed}} allowed and {{blocked}} blocked tools into your existing permissions?
permissions.importSuccess: Imported. Added {{addedAllowed}} allowed and {{addedBlocked}} blocked tools.

skipPermissions.title: Skip permission prompts
skipPermissions.description: Run tool calls without asking for confirmation. This maps to bypassPermissions and should only be used in trusted workspaces.
skipPermissions.warning: Permission prompts are currently bypassed. Allowed and blocked rules below are still saved, but this global mode lets the agent run without asking.

allowedTools.title: Allowed Tools
allowedTools.description: Tools that are automatically allowed without prompting for permission

blockedTools.title: Blocked Tools
blockedTools.description: Tools that are automatically blocked without prompting for permission

allowedCommands.title: Allowed Shell Commands
allowedCommands.description: Shell commands that are automatically allowed without prompting

blockedCommands.title: Blocked Shell Commands
blockedCommands.description: Shell commands that are automatically blocked

codex.description: Controls how Codex handles file modifications and command execution

default.title: Default
default.description: Only trusted commands (ls, cat, grep, git status, etc.) run automatically. Other commands are skipped. Can write to workspace.

acceptEdits.title: Accept Edits
acceptEdits.description: All commands run automatically within the workspace. Full auto mode with sandboxed execution.

bypassPermissions.title: Bypass Permissions
bypassPermissions.description: Full system access with no restrictions. All commands run automatically with full disk and network access. Use with caution.

technicalInfo.default: sandboxMode=workspace-write, approvalPolicy=untrusted. Trusted commands: cat, cd, grep, head, ls, pwd, tail, git status/log/diff/show, find (without -exec), etc.
technicalInfo.acceptEdits: sandboxMode=workspace-write, approvalPolicy=never. All commands auto-execute within project directory.
technicalInfo.bypassPermissions: sandboxMode=danger-full-access, approvalPolicy=never. Full system access, use only in trusted environments.
technicalInfo.overrideNote: You can override this per-session using the mode button in the chat interface.

description.pilotdeck: Model Context Protocol servers provide additional tools and data sources to PilotDeck
description.cursor: Model Context Protocol servers provide additional tools and data sources to Cursor
description.codex: Model Context Protocol servers provide additional tools and data sources to Codex

help.title: About Codex MCP
help.description: Codex supports stdio-based MCP servers. You can add servers that extend Codex's capabilities with additional tools and resources.

mcpConfig.title: MCP Servers
mcpConfig.description: Edit PilotDeck MCP config. Global config lives in ~/.pilotdeck/mcp.json; project config lives in .pilotdeck/mcp.json and overrides global servers with the same name.
mcpConfig.saved: MCP config saved. New sessions and the next runtime rebuild will use it.
mcpConfig.fixJsonBeforeTemplate: Fix the JSON before inserting a template.
mcpConfig.nameRequired: Every MCP server needs a name before saving.

fields.name: Name
fields.perSessionHelp: Start a fresh MCP process for each agent session.

status.fixYamlInFilesystem: Fix the config file in the filesystem, then refresh.

processEnv.label: Process Env
processEnv.applied: Native settings have been applied to this process.

rawYaml.configInvalidSeeBelow: Config has validation errors — see below
rawYaml.yamlParseError: The config file YAML failed to parse. Fix it in the filesystem, then refresh.
rawYaml.cannotParse: Could not parse the config file YAML. Fix it in the filesystem, then refresh.

sectionGroups.basicDescription: Configure model services before running this service.

models.label: Model Pool
models.description: Models available to agents, memory, and routing

runtime.title: Service
runtime.description: Configure service ports, data paths, and network proxy. Changes to ports or paths usually require restarting the service.

host.label: Host
host.description: Bind interface for the HTTP/WebSocket server.

vitePort.label: Vite port
vitePort.description: Frontend dev server (only used when running `npm run dev`).

databasePath.label: Database path
databasePath.description: SQLite auth/projects database (~ expands to home).

workspacesRoot.label: Workspaces root
workspacesRoot.description: Directory under which projects are scanned.

proxyUrl.label: HTTPS proxy
proxyUrl.description: Outbound HTTPS proxy URL. Applies to both Gateway and UI Server (proxy.url in pilotdeck.yaml).

proxyNoProxy.label: No-proxy list
proxyNoProxy.description: Comma-separated hostnames/IPs that bypass the proxy (proxy.noProxy in pilotdeck.yaml). 127.0.0.1 and localhost are always excluded.

models.title: Model Pool
models.description: Configure model providers, API keys, base URLs, and enabled models. Agents, memory, and routing choose from the enabled models here.
models.providerIdDuplicate: A Provider id with this name already exists.
models.emptyProviders: No providers configured yet. Click "Add provider" to get started.
models.baseUrlHint: For OpenAI-compatible providers, include the /v1 suffix, for example https://api.example.com/v1.
models.maskedKeyPlaceholder: Existing key kept — type to replace
models.keyHidden: Key hidden; leave as-is to keep, retype to replace.

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Set the main agent, subagents, and model parameters.

mainModel.label: Main agent model
mainModel.description: Model used for the main conversation.

capabilities.title: Model Settings
capabilities.noCatalog: No catalog entry; defaulting to text only.
capabilities.imageWarning: Enable only when the upstream model supports images.
capabilities.maxOutputDescription: Maximum tokens generated in one response. Leave empty to use the default.
capabilities.maxContextDescription: Context window used for auto-compaction. Leave empty to use the model default.

subagents.label: Subagents default
subagents.description: Default model for subagents on non-router paths.
subagents.routerNote: When PilotDeck Router or Token Saver is enabled, subagent requests enter the router first. By default, the subagent policy re-judges each subagent turn and picks a tier model. This default only acts as a direct subagent fallback or inherited baseline; it does not override the subagent routing policy in Router advanced settings.

customEnv.title: Environment Variables
customEnv.description: Custom env vars injected into every agent session. Persisted in config.yaml — no need to reconfigure after switching sessions.
customEnv.existingValueKept: Existing value kept — type to replace
customEnv.valueHidden: Value hidden; leave as-is to keep, retype to replace.

alwaysOn.title: Always-On
alwaysOn.description: Configure automatic discovery globally and opt individual workspaces in.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Master switch for Always-On background agent.

trigger.title: Trigger
trigger.description: Controls when and how often discovery runs fire.

autoDiscovery.label: Auto discovery
autoDiscovery.description: When enabled, Always-On periodically inspects opted-in workspaces and proposes follow-up plans.

tickInterval.label: Tick interval (minutes)
tickInterval.description: How often the daemon checks opted-in workspaces.

cooldown.label: Cooldown (minutes)
cooldown.description: Minimum time between discovery runs per workspace.

dailyBudget.label: Daily budget
dailyBudget.description: Maximum automatic discovery runs per workspace per day.

heartbeatStale.label: Heartbeat stale (seconds)
heartbeatStale.description: Heartbeats older than this are considered stale.

recentUserMsg.label: Recent user msg (minutes)
recentUserMsg.description: Only fire if the user sent a message within this window.

preferChannel.label: Preferred channel
preferChannel.description: Channel the discovery agent prefers to interact through.

dormancy.title: Dormancy
dormancy.description: File-system watcher that pauses discovery while the user is actively editing.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Suppress discovery fires while the workspace has recent file changes.

debounce.label: Debounce (ms)
debounce.description: Wait this long after the last file change before resuming.

ignoreGlobs.label: Ignore globs
ignoreGlobs.description: File patterns excluded from dormancy detection, one per line.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Isolated workspace strategy for Always-On runs.

gitWorktree.label: Git worktree base dir
gitWorktree.description: Root directory for git worktree-based isolation.

snapshotMaxBytes.label: Snapshot max bytes
snapshotMaxBytes.description: Maximum size of a workspace snapshot.

gitLfs.label: Git LFS
gitLfs.description: Include Git LFS objects in workspace snapshots.

execution.title: Execution
execution.description: Safety limits for each Always-On run.

maxTurns.label: Max turns
maxTurns.description: Maximum number of agent turns per run.

maxToolCalls.label: Max tool calls
maxToolCalls.description: Maximum total tool calls per run.

workspaceOptIn.title: Workspace opt-in
workspaceOptIn.description: Only enabled workspaces receive Always-On heartbeats and scheduled discovery checks.
workspaceOptIn.empty: No recognized projects yet. Add or open a workspace first.

cron.title: Cron
cron.description: Configure the background scheduler used by Cron jobs. Create and manage jobs from Always-On > Plans & Cron Jobs.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Master switch for scheduled Cron background tasks.

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone used as the scheduler default.

maxConcurrentRuns.label: Max concurrent runs
maxConcurrentRuns.description: Maximum number of Cron runs that may execute at the same time.

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: Configure the model used for memory indexing and Dream.

tools.title: Search
tools.description: Configure the search service used by the agent's web_search tool.

apiKey.label: API key
apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider.
apiKey.maskedPlaceholder: Existing key kept — type to replace
apiKey.keyHidden: Key hidden; leave as-is to keep, retype to replace.

endpoint.label: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Custom endpoint. Leave empty to use the default.

name.label: Name
name.description: Name of this custom search service.

auth.label: Auth
auth.description: How the API key is sent.

params.label: Parameter names
params.description: Parameter names for the query and API key.

mapping.label: Result mapping
mapping.description: Fields used to read search results from the response.

router.title: PilotDeck Router
router.description: Embedded router for fan-out across providers (tier-based routing, token saver, auto-orchestrate).

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: When on, agents use the router instead of the configured provider directly.

default.label: Default
default.description: Primary route used when no tier-specific decision applies.

judge.label: Judge model
judge.description: Model used to classify the request before choosing a token-saving tier.

simple.label: Simple
simple.description: Quick Q&A, confirmations, light rewrites, and simple file operations.

medium.label: Medium
medium.description: Single tool calls, short generation, small file edits, and standard coding changes.

complex.label: Complex
complex.description: Work that should be decomposed or delegated to sub-agents.

reasoning.label: Reasoning
reasoning.description: Multi-file analysis, long-context work, reports, and deep reasoning.

zeroUsageRetry.label: Zero-usage retry
zeroUsageRetry.description: Automatically retry when the upstream returns a response with zero tokens used.

maxAttempts.label: Max attempts
maxAttempts.description: Maximum retry attempts before giving up.

tokenSaver.title: Token Saver
tokenSaver.description: A lightweight judge classifies each turn into a tier and routes it to a cost-appropriate model.

judgeTimeout.label: Judge timeout (ms)
judgeTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for the judge decision.

subagentPolicy.label: Sub-agent policy
subagentPolicy.description: How sub-agents are routed: 'judge' re-evaluates each sub-agent turn, 'skip' keeps the direct sub-agent route.

autoOrchestrate.title: Auto Orchestrate
autoOrchestrate.description: Automatically fan out complex turns into parallel sub-agents when the judge assigns certain tiers.

slimPrompt.label: Slim system prompt
slimPrompt.description: Use a shorter system prompt for orchestrated sub-agents to save tokens.

stats.label: Stats collection
stats.description: Track token usage and cost per session. Powers the Dashboard tab.

pricing.title: Model Pricing
pricing.description: Custom pricing per model ($/million tokens). Used when the API doesn't report cost.
pricing.empty: No custom pricing configured. Built-in defaults cover common models (DeepSeek, Claude, GPT, Gemini, GLM, Qwen, Llama, etc).

scenarios.title: Scenarios
scenarios.description: Map scenario names to models. default is the primary route.

fallback.title: Fallback Chains
fallback.description: Ordered fallback models per scenario. If the primary fails, the router tries the next.

tiers.title: Tiers
tiers.description: Complexity tiers the judge can route to. Pick a model for each — descriptions are pre-filled.
tiers.placeholder: Describe when the judge should pick this tier…

rules.title: Judge Rules
rules.empty: No custom rules. The judge uses tier descriptions only.
rules.placeholder: Add a rule for the judge…

gateway.title: Gateway
gateway.description: Messaging gateway (Feishu / Telegram / Discord / Slack) — channel-level secrets are best edited via Raw YAML.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: When on, the gateway home is generated and channels with credentials come online.

home.label: Gateway home
home.description: Working directory for gateway state and per-channel configs.

subsystemReload.title: Subsystem reload status
subsystemReload.fallbackDescription: Reload status will appear after the first save or external edit.

pluginSettings.title: Plugins
pluginSettings.description: Extend the interface with custom plugins. Install from git or drop a folder in ~/.pilotdeck/plugins/
pluginSettings.securityWarning: Only install plugins whose source code you have reviewed or from authors you trust.
pluginSettings.noGitRemote: No git remote — update not available

starterPlugin.name: Project Stats
starterPlugin.description: File counts, lines of code, file-type breakdown, and recent activity for your project.

terminalPlugin.name: Terminal
terminalPlugin.description: Integrated terminal with full shell access directly within the interface.
